records.question: Which TV channels in the United Kingdom aired the cartoon titled Journey to the Center of the Bat! directed by Michael Chang?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
JOIN cartoon ON tv_channel.id = cartoon.channel
WHERE cartoon.title = 'Journey to the Center of the Bat!' AND cartoon.directed_by = 'Michael Chang' AND tv_channel.country = 'United Kingdom'
records.pred_sql: select tv_channel.id from tv_channel join cartoon on cartoon.channel = tv_channel.id where lower(tv_channel.country) like '%united kingdom%' and lower(cartoon.title) like '%journey to the center of the bat!%' and lower(cartoon.directed_by) like '%michael chang%' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find TV channels in the United Kingdom that aired the cartoon titled 'Journey to the Center of the Bat!' directed by Michael Chang by joining TV_Channel and Cartoon on channel id and filtering by country, title, and director.

records.question: Which TV channels that are not pay-per-view and have music content included in the Sky Famiglia package feature cartoons written by Todd Casey, directed by Brandon Vietti, originally aired in 2009, and with a production code of at least 111.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
JOIN cartoon ON tv_channel.id = cartoon.channel
WHERE tv_channel.content = 'music' AND tv_channel.package_option = 'Sky Famiglia' AND cartoon.written_by = 'Todd Casey' AND cartoon.directed_by = 'Brandon Vietti' AND cartoon.original_air_date LIKE '%2009%' AND cartoon.production_code >= 111.0 AND tv_channel.pay_per_view_ppv = 'no'
records.pred_sql: select tv_channel.id from tv_channel join cartoon on cartoon.channel = tv_channel.id where tv_channel.pay_per_view_ppv = 'no' and lower(tv_channel.content) like '%music%' and lower(tv_channel.package_option) like '%sky famiglia%' and lower(cartoon.written_by) like '%todd casey%' and lower(cartoon.directed_by) like '%brandon vietti%' and cartoon.original_air_date like '2009%' and cast(cartoon.production_code as real) >= 111.0 limit 5
records.thought: Filter TV channels that are not pay-per-view, have music content, and belong to the Sky Famiglia package. Join with Cartoon to filter cartoons written by Todd Casey, directed by Brandon Vietti, aired in 2009, and with production code >= 111.0.

records.question: Which Italian tv channels that are not high definition have cartoons?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
JOIN cartoon ON tv_channel.id = cartoon.channel
WHERE tv_channel.language = 'Italian' AND tv_channel.hight_definition_tv = 'no'
records.pred_sql: select tv_channel.id from tv_channel join cartoon on cartoon.channel = tv_channel.id where lower(tv_channel.country) like '%italy%' and lower(tv_channel.hight_definition_tv) != 'yes' limit 5;
records.thought: To find Italian TV channels that are not high definition and have cartoons, join TV_Channel with Cartoon on channel ID, filter by Country 'italy' and Hight_definition_TV not equal to 'yes'.

records.question: Which TV channels in English with the series name MTV Dance and Sky Famiglia package offer cartoons and have the Game Three episode in their series without pay-per-view?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
JOIN tv_series ON tv_channel.id = tv_series.channel
JOIN cartoon ON tv_channel.id = cartoon.channel
WHERE tv_series.episode = 'Game Three' AND tv_channel.series_name = 'MTV Dance' AND tv_channel.language = 'English' AND tv_channel.package_option = 'Sky Famiglia' AND tv_channel.pay_per_view_ppv = 'no'
records.pred_sql: select tv_channel.id from tv_channel join cartoon on cartoon.channel = tv_channel.id join tv_series on tv_series.channel = tv_channel.id where lower(tv_channel.language) like '%english%' and lower(tv_channel.series_name) like '%mtv dance%' and lower(tv_channel.package_option) like '%sky famiglia%' and tv_channel.pay_per_view_ppv = 'no' and lower(tv_series.episode) like '%game three%' limit 5
records.thought: Filter TV_Channel for English language, series name 'MTV Dance', Sky Famiglia package, and no pay-per-view. Join with Cartoon to ensure the channel offers cartoons and join with TV_series to find the 'Game Three' episode in their series.

records.question: Which TV channels broadcast in Italian and are based in Italy?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
WHERE tv_channel.language = 'Italian' AND tv_channel.country = 'Italy'
records.pred_sql: select tv_channel.id from tv_channel where lower(language) like '%italian%' and lower(country) like '%italy%' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter TV channels where the language is Italian and the country is Italy, using case-insensitive matching for text fields.

records.question: What Sky Famiglia music channels in Italy are part of the Match Music series, have a pixel aspect ratio of 4:3 / 16:9, and are not high definition or pay-per-view?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
WHERE tv_channel.package_option = 'Sky Famiglia' AND tv_channel.hight_definition_tv = 'no' AND tv_channel.pay_per_view_ppv = 'no' AND tv_channel.country = 'Italy' AND tv_channel.content = 'music' AND tv_channel.pixel_aspect_ratio_par = '4:3 / 16:9' AND tv_channel.series_name = 'Match Music'
records.pred_sql: select tv_channel.id from tv_channel where lower(series_name) like '%match music%' and lower(country) like '%italy%' and lower(content) like '%sky famiglia music%' and pixel_aspect_ratio_par = '4:3 / 16:9' and hight_definition_tv = 'no' and pay_per_view_ppv = 'no' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter TV_Channel for those with series_name like 'match music', Country like 'italy', Content like 'sky famiglia music', pixel aspect ratio '4:3 / 16:9', and where high definition and pay-per-view are 'no'.

records.question: Which TV channels in the United Kingdom have both TV series and cartoons, where the cartoons are directed by Michael Chang?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
JOIN tv_series ON tv_channel.id = tv_series.channel
JOIN cartoon ON tv_channel.id = cartoon.channel
WHERE cartoon.directed_by = 'Michael Chang' AND tv_channel.country = 'United Kingdom'
records.pred_sql: select distinct tv_channel.id from tv_channel join tv_series on tv_series.channel = tv_channel.id join cartoon on cartoon.channel = tv_channel.id where lower(tv_channel.country) like '%united kingdom%' and lower(cartoon.directed_by) like '%michael chang%' limit 5
records.thought: I need to find TV channels in the United Kingdom that have both TV series and cartoons, with the cartoons directed by Michael Chang. This requires joining TV_Channel with TV_series and Cartoon tables, filtering by country and director, and selecting distinct channel ids.

records.question: Which TV channels that are not pay-per-view, have package_option no ( FTV ), and content is music also air series where viewers_m is 5.13, share is 6.0, weekly_rank is at least 80.0, and feature cartoons with production_code at least 108.0?

SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
JOIN tv_series ON tv_channel.id = tv_series.channel
JOIN cartoon ON tv_channel.id = cartoon.channel
